overall.description: First-person gameplay footage from Cyberpunk 2077 showing a walk along a futuristic waterfront promenade transitioning into a covered urban plaza. The scene features bright sunlight, palm trees, modern architecture with neon signage, and various NPC pedestrians. The player character walks past a crime scene, through a grassy area, and up stairs into a covered plaza with digital billboards.

scene_state.functional_zone: futuristic waterfront promenade with crime scene investigation

events.description: passing yellow crime scene tape cordoning off the left side of the walkway
group of NPCs cross the path from left to right in front of the camera

agents.ego_description: walking steadily along the waterfront promenade past a cordoned-off crime scene with police tape

notable_agents.action: NPC in work clothes with yellow boots walking across the path from left to right
NPC in pink jacket walking away from camera along the promenade

entered.detail: Large modern building with glass facade and neon signage featuring cylindrical architectural elements
Tall palm trees lining the concrete waterfront barrier
Angled concrete barrier wall separating the walkway from the water
Yellow police tape cordoning off an area near the building entrance
Large digital screen displaying advertisements visible in the distance down the promenade

segments.scene_description: The segment opens on a bright sunny day along a futuristic waterfront promenade. The camera moves forward past a crime scene marked with yellow police tape on the left, while palm trees line the right side along a concrete barrier. Various NPCs walk across the path, including workers in distinctive clothing. Modern architecture with neon accents rises on the left side.

scene_state.functional_zone: urban plaza with landscaped grass approaching building entrance stairs

events.description: turning left toward the building entrance and away from the waterfront
approaching the wide concrete stairs leading up to the covered plaza area

agents.ego_description: turning left from the promenade into a plaza area with grass patches and small trees, heading toward the stairs

notable_agents.action: NPC in brown coat and hat walking ahead toward the concrete stairs
NPC in black outfit descending the stairs toward the camera

entered.detail: Landscaped plaza area with grass patches and small palm trees in planters
Wide concrete staircase with multiple steps leading up to the covered entrance

segments.scene_description: The camera turns left into a landscaped plaza area with grass and small trees, moving away from the waterfront. The futuristic building looms larger on the left as the camera approaches a wide set of concrete stairs. NPCs are seen both ascending and descending the stairs ahead.

scene_state.functional_zone: covered stairway and entrance to indoor plaza with neon lighting

events.description: ascending the wide concrete stairs into the covered area
entering the covered plaza area where artificial neon lighting mixes with natural light

agents.ego_description: walking up the large concrete stairs into the covered plaza area with increasing shade

notable_agents.action: NPC in pink jacket ascending the stairs ahead of the camera
NPC in white outfit with mask walking down the stairs

entered.detail: Overhead concrete roof structure covering the plaza entrance with geometric patterns
Large vertical digital billboard displaying a pink neon anime-style character

segments.scene_description: The camera ascends the wide concrete stairs into a covered area, transitioning from bright sunlight to mixed lighting. The overhead plaza roof becomes visible, and a large neon pink billboard appears on the left. The environment shifts from open waterfront to an enclosed urban space with artificial lighting elements.

scene_state.functional_zone: covered urban plaza with neon signage and digital billboards

events.description: fully entering the covered plaza with multiple pedestrians and prominent neon lighting

agents.ego_description: walking through the covered plaza observing the neon signs, digital billboards, and other pedestrians

notable_agents.action: NPC with blue hair and colorful shirt walking past the camera
Group of NPCs walking through the plaza center under the covered roof

entered.detail: Storefronts with illuminated signs and entrances under the covered area
Fluorescent and neon light strips running along the ceiling of the covered plaza

segments.scene_description: The final segment shows the camera entering the fully covered plaza with tiled flooring and no visible sky. Neon lighting dominates the environment, with the large pink billboard now prominent on the left. Various NPCs walk through the space, and shop entrances with illuminated signage line the sides of the covered walkway.

merged_segments.scene_description: The shot follows a continuous first-person movement from a sun-drenched waterfront promenade into a neon-lit, enclosed urban plaza. It begins by moving forward along a bright concrete path, passing a police crime scene on the left and palm trees on the right amidst a flow of pedestrians. As the camera turns left, the open waterfront recedes and the scene shifts into a landscaped area with grass and small trees, drawing closer to a looming futuristic building. The camera then ascends a wide set of concrete stairs, transitioning from the glare of natural sunlight into the mixed lighting of a covered overhead structure where a large pink neon billboard first appears. Finally, the movement leads deep into the fully enclosed plaza, where the sky vanishes and the environment is dominated by tiled flooring, artificial neon glows, and illuminated shop entrances.
